case_title: MARIE SOPIE KOUAME RESPONDENT VS. PERCY GREEN et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT GREEN, PERCY GREEN, TINA AS TO RESPONDENT KOUAME, MARIE SOPIE HEARING SET FOR APR-16-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED

`SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL TRIAL DE NOVO ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WAS INTRODUCED. MATTER WAS SUBMITTED. COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF MARIE SOPIE KOUAME AND AGAINST PERCY GREEN AND TINA GREEN FOR $1114.80 AND $82.00 COSTS AND ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF CROSS COMPLAINANT PERCY GREEN AND TINA GREEN AND AGAINST CROSS DEFENDANT MARIE SOPIE KOUAME FOR $675.41 JPT C. ROSACK, CLERK J. BAUBEL, NOT REPORTED (525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT KOUAME, MARIE SOPIE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GREEN, PERCY GREEN, TINA $1,114.80 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,196.80, COURT ALSO AWARDS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF CROSS COMPLAINANTS PERCY GREEN AND TINA GREEN AND AGAINST CROSS DEFENDANT MARIE SOPIE KOUAME FOR $675.41, NO COSTS SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
